# openfootball — World Cup 2026 (vendored)

Source: https://github.com/openfootball/world-cup (2026--usa)
License: CC0 1.0 Universal (public domain).

These files are the real WC2026 draw, groups, venues and match schedule.
Used by `pnpm --filter @worldcup/ingestion import:openfootball` to generate
`packages/shared/src/data/worldcup2026.json` (the app's real dataset).
